package rulefixtures

// scenario for append_then_sort_each_iteration: Slice sorting observed inside loops - often cheaper to sort once after the loop.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario341Negative(values []string) string {
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	best := values[0]
	for _, value := range values[1:] {
		if value < best { best = value }
	}
	return best
}
